title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available for Earbuds and Charge Case
scenario: Software Update tab displays current/available versions, release notes, individual Update buttons, and Update All button when both Voyager Free 60+ earbuds and charge case have firmware updates available
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on Poly Voyager Free 60+ device
Scroll to and tap on Software Update
Ensure both earbuds and charge case have a firmware update available
expected:
The Software Update tab displays:
- Current and available firmware versions for both earbuds and charge case
- Release notes for each component (earbuds and charge case)
- Individual "Update" buttons for earbuds and charge case
- An additional "Update All" button
